ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent to participate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial is conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the data point belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data point was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data point was collected */,
  "milliseconds_since_trial_start" REAL /* Milliseconds since the trial started */,
  "magnetic" REAL /* Magnetic reading */,
  "geographic" REAL /* Geographic reading */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data point */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the analytics result belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the analytics result belongs to */,
  "magnetic_diff" REAL /* Difference between magnetic readings */,
  "geographic_diff" REAL /* Difference between geographic readings */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the readings */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analytics session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analytics session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the setting value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
